positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) in dynamic profile, standing amongst glowing bioluminescent flora and geometric constellations. The fox has a flowing, ethereal silhouette, rendered in deep indigo and cerulean blues, accented with glowing gold lines that trace its fur and the surrounding mystical elements. The composition is highly symmetrical, centered on the fox, with strong contrast between the dark, starry background and the luminous foreground elements. Style: Neo-Art Deco mixed with Japanese woodblock print aesthetics (Ukiyo-e). Lighting: Dramatic, atmospheric backlighting with deep shadows, emphasizing the glowing internal light source. Color Palette: Deep indigo, sapphire blue, glowing gold, and emerald accents. Perfect for apparel print, scalable vector appearance, high detail, clean lines, flat print style, sticker design.
negative: blur, artifacts, grain, noise, low detail, watermark, text, logos, signatures, out of focus, fuzzy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic photography, hyperrealism, 3d render
